mapper.select: SELECT ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.posting_date, ac.status, ac.is_favorite, ac.updated_at AS application_updated_at, ca.industry AS company_industry, fa.id AS fit_analysis_id, fa.fit_score, fa.matched_skills, fa.missing_skills, fa.recommended_study, fa.recommended_certificates, fa.strategy, fa.created_at AS analyzed_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session interview_count_source WHERE interview_count_source.application_case_id = ac.id AND interview_count_source.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS interview_count, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(interview_score_source.total_score)) FROM interview_session interview_score_source WHERE interview_score_source.application_case_id = ac.id AND interview_score_source.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS average_interview_score, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session scored_interview_count_source WHERE scored_interview_count_source.application_case_id = ac.id AND scored_interview_count_source.deleted_at IS NULL AND scored_interview_count_source.total_score IS NOT NULL ) AS scored_interview_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_answer answer_count_source INNER JOIN interview_question answer_question ON answer_question.id = answer_count_source.question_id INNER JOIN interview_session answer_session ON answer_session.id = answer_question.interview_session_id WHERE answer_session.application_case_id = ac.id AND answer_session.deleted_at IS NULL AND answer_count_source.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' ) AS interview_answer_count, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(answer_score_source.score)) FROM interview_answer answer_score_source INNER JOIN interview_question score_question ON score_question.id = answer_score_source.question_id INNER JOIN interview_session score_session ON score_session.id = score_question.interview_session_id WHERE score_session.application_case_id = ac.id AND score_session.deleted_at IS NULL AND answer_score_source.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' ) AS average_interview_answer_score, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_answer scored_answer_count_source INNER JOIN interview_question scored_answer_question ON scored_answer_question.id = scored_answer_count_source.question_id INNER JOIN interview_session scored_answer_session ON scored_answer_session.id = scored_answer_question.interview_session_id WHERE scored_answer_session.application_case_id = ac.id AND scored_answer_session.deleted_at IS NULL AND scored_answer_count_source.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' AND scored_answer_count_source.score IS NOT NULL ) AS scored_interview_answer_count , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_answer corrected_answer_source INNER JOIN interview_question corrected_question ON corrected_question.id = corrected_answer_source.question_id INNER JOIN interview_session corrected_session ON corrected_session.id = corrected_question.interview_session_id WHERE corrected_session.application_case_id = ac.id AND corrected_session.deleted_at IS NULL AND corrected_answer_source.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' AND corrected_answer_source.improved_answer IS NOT NULL AND corrected_answer_source.improved_answer != '' ) AS corrected_answer_count FROM application_case ac LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.application_case_id = ac.id AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = ac.id ) LEFT JOIN company_analysis ca ON ca.application_case_id = ac.id AND ca.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_ca.id) FROM company_analysis latest_ca WHERE latest_ca.application_case_id = ac.id ) WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ac.is_favorite DESC, COALESCE(fa.created_at, ac.updated_at) DESC, ac.id DESC

SELECT (SELECT ROUND(AVG(fa.fit_score)) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS current_fit_average, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(fa.fit_score)) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND fa.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS previous_fit_average, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(JSON_LENGTH(fa.missing_skills)), 0) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS current_gap_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(JSON_LENGTH(fa.missing_skills)), 0) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND fa.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS previous_gap_count, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(session.total_score)) FROM interview_session session INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.total_score IS NOT NULL AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS current_interview_average, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(session.total_score)) FROM interview_session session INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.total_score IS NOT NULL AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND session.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS previous_interview_average

SELECT fa.application_case_id, fa.fit_score, fa.created_at AS analyzed_at FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.fit_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fa.created_at, fa.id

SELECT COALESCE(iq.question_type, 'EXPECTED') AS question_type, ia.score, ia.feedback FROM interview_answer ia INNER JOIN interview_question iq ON iq.id = ia.question_id INNER JOIN interview_session s ON s.id = iq.interview_session_id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND ia.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' AND ia.score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ia.score ASC, ia.id DESC
